<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List workspace user bindings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshworkspacebindings/userbindings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List and filter workspace user bindings

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"username","in":"query","description":"Filter for user bindings associated to the given user (optional)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"workspaceRole","in":"query","description":"Filter for user bindings with the given workspace role (optional)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"workspaceIdentifier","in":"query","description":"Filter for user bindings associated to the given workspace (optional)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshworkspaceuserbinding.v2.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshworkspaceuserbinding.v2.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshworkspaceuserbinding.v2.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshWorkspaceUserBindingList","required":["_links","page"],"type":"object","properties":{"_links":{"type":"object","description":"Currently only contains the self link and <<paging,pagination>> links."},"_embedded":{"required":["meshWorkspaceUserBindings"],"type":"object","properties":{"meshWorkspaceUserBindings":{"type":"array","description":"List of <<mesh_workspaceUserBinding_response_fields,meshWorkspaceUserBinding>>.","items":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object"},{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"string"},{"type":"number"}]}}}},"page":{"type":"object","description":"See <<paging,Paging information>>."}}},"examples":{"meshWorkspaceUserBindingList":{"value":"{\n  \"_embedded\" : {\n    \"meshWorkspaceUserBindings\" : [ {\n      \"kind\" : \"meshWorkspaceUserBinding\",\n      \"apiVersion\" : \"v2\",\n      \"metadata\" : {\n        \"name\" : \"user-binding-name\"\n      },\n      \"roleRef\" : {\n        \"name\" : \"Workspace Manager\"\n      },\n      \"targetRef\" : {\n        \"name\" : \"test-workspace\",\n        \"displayName\" : \"test-workspace Workspace\"\n      },\n      \"subject\" : {\n        \"name\" : \"john.doe49a0\"\n      },\n      \"_links\" : {\n        \"self\" : {\n          \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshworkspacebindings/userbindings/user-binding-name\"\n        }\n      }\n    } ]\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshworkspacebindings/userbindings?username=john.doe49a0&workspaceRole=Workspace%20Manager&workspaceIdentifier=test-workspace\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"page\" : {\n    \"size\" : 50,\n    \"totalElements\" : 1,\n    \"totalPages\" : 1,\n    \"number\" : 0\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
